data.title: Why Bitcoin is set to start an ‘insane rally’
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) appears to be on the brink of a massive rally that could see the asset establish its price above $150,000 if a rare and powerful historical setup plays out. According to an analysis by prominent online cryptocurrency analyst TradingShot, the maiden digital asset is replicating a technical pattern that has preceded every major bull run. This time, it’s occurring for the second time within the same cycle, a first in the asset’s history. In a TradingView post on April 11, the analyst stated that the key driver of this projected rally is the Global Liquidity Cycle Indicator, which has formed another “higher low” on the monthly chart
source: https://finbold.com/why-bitcoin-is-set-to-start-an-insane-rally/

data.title: Bitcoin still on track for $1.8M in 2035, says analyst
data.description:
Bitcoin remains on track to surpass $1. 8 million by 2035 despite recent price corrections and waning investor appetite caused by ongoing global trade tensions, according to Joe Burnett, director of market research at Unchained. Speaking during Cointelegraph’s Chainreaction live show on X, Burnett said that Bitcoin is still in a long-term bullish cycle and could potentially rival or surpass gold’s $21 trillion market capitalization within the next decade. Despite tariff uncertainty limiting risk appetite among investors, research analysts remain optimistic about Bitcoin’s (BTC) long-term prospects for the next decade
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-to-1-8-m-2035-trump-trade-war-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: LBank will launch IP Exchange (IPX)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch IP Exchange (IPX) at 15:00 (SGT) on April 13, and open IPX/USDT trading pairs. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 15:00 on April 14.

data.title: From Dogecoin to D.O.G.E: Is Elon Musk Playing a Billionaire’s Crypto Experiment?
data.description:
Originally launched as a parody of crypto speculation, Dogecoin has since become the kind of speculative asset it was meant to mock — largely due to Elon Musk’s influence. His social media activity and public endorsements have played a central and ongoing role in shaping DOGE’s trajectory. BeInCrypto spoke with Erwin Voloder, Head of Policy of the European Blockchain Association, to discuss how Musk blurred the lines between parody and promotion, leading people to assign real-world value to a meme and generating ethical concerns along the way. The Genesis of Dogecoin Toward the end of 2013, software engineers Billy Markus and Jackson Palmer joined forces to create Dogecoin, the first meme coin in crypto history
source: https://beincrypto.com/dogecoin-doge-elon-musk-crypto-experiment/

data.title: TRC20-USDT Issuance Reaches Record High on TRON Network
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from TRONSCAN indicates that the issuance of TRC20-USDT has surged to 68.7 billion tokens, marking a new all-time high. Since the beginning of this year, the TRON network has increased its USDT issuance by nearly 9 billion tokens. Currently, TRC20-USDT accounts for 47.6% of the total USDT issuance across all networks. The number of accounts holding TRC20-USDT has reached 64.02 million, with cumulative transfers exceeding 2.435 billion transactions.

data.title: Bitget Wallet launches PAXG on-chain gold trading event
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Wallet, the world's leading Web3 wallet, now supports PAXG spot and contract transactions, and has simultaneously launched trading activities to encourage users to deploy gold assets on the chain. The event will be held from 14:00 on April 12 to 14:00 on April 20 (UTC+8). Users who complete PAXG transactions can share a total of $9,000 in rewards.
PAXG is a token issued by Paxos, each anchored to 1 ounce of physical gold. As the international situation heats up and the gold price breaks through $3,200, on-chain gold is becoming a new destination for safe-haven funds. Bitget Wallet provides a simple and smooth one-stop trading experience, supports one-click cross-chain transactions of 130+ public chains and millions of assets, and is equipped with Gas optimization and security protection mechanisms to help users easily grasp gold value preservation opportunities while enjoying the actual benefits brought by DeFi.

data.title: DWF Labs has deployed USD1 liquidity on ETH and BSC, and USD1 will be officially launched
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, DWF Labs has begun to deploy the USD1 liquidity of the US dollar stablecoin launched by WLFI, a DeFi project supported by the Trump family, on the chain, marking that the stablecoin now supports on-chain circulation and transactions. Data shows that in the past 8 days, the DWF Labs address received a total of 11 million USD1 from WLFI on both Ethereum and BSC chains.
The current deployment includes:
Ethereum chain: USDT/USD1, USDC/USD1, USDf/USD1, ETH/USD1 trading pairs have been deployed on Uniswap V3;
BSC chain: USDT/USD1, BNB/USD1 trading pairs have been deployed on PancakeSwap V3.
